name: auto_cinematic_storyboard_master_skill
description: One unified skill that generates cinematic stories, storyboard structures, image prompts, start-frame prompts, stop-frame prompts, and Seedance 2-ready video prompts from a short user synopsis and style direction.
primary_goal: Turn a simple story idea into a complete cinematic production prompt package.
core_principles: Do not produce flat walk-and-follow coverage unless explicitly requested.
Vary shot scale, camera angle, framing, emotional distance, and pose design.
Use close-up detail shots strategically for rhythm and visual interest.
Preserve continuity across shots unless the script explicitly changes scene, time, wardrobe, or environment.
For each shot, produce both image prompt and video prompt.
For each shot, produce start-frame prompt and stop-frame prompt.
Each shot's stop frame should be usable as the next shot's start frame.
